title: Regression when initial-ising reg used on negedge clock

features.name: initial assignment to reg with negedge clocked always block in generate
features.description: Code should include an initial block assigning a value to a reg that is also used in an always block triggered on negedge clock within a generate block

features.name: parameterized generate block with conditional clock edge selection
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a parameter-driven if statement to select between negedge and posedge clocking
features.snippet:
generate
    if (neg_clk) begin
        always @(negedge clk) q <= d;
    end
    else begin
        always @(posedge clk) q <= d;
    end
endgenerate

features.name: module instantiation with different parameter values for posedge and negedge
features.description: Code should include two module instantiations of the same template with different parameter values to trigger different clock edge behaviors
features.snippet:
template #(.neg_clk(1)) neg_clk(clk, d, q[0]);
template #(.neg_clk(0)) pos_clk(clk, d, q[1]);
